SPOTLIGHT: For more about hurricane destruction see:

November/December 2005
Public SafetyTechnology

This spotlight section directs readers to multiple resources about hurricane destruction, including articles on mapping storm damage with GIS technology, identifying vulnerable populations, and reporting on coastal communities.
